catalogueIdentification.title: Barcodes and labels
catalogueIdentification.subtitle: Scan lookup, article assignment, anomaly resolution and print batch tracking.

access.title: Restricted access
access.description: Your profile cannot open the article identification centre.

search.title: Search by scan or barcode
search.description: Quickly find an identified article or anomalies associated with a code.
search.enterCode: Enter a code to display article matches and scans to process.
search.noDirectMatch: No direct match found among active barcodes.
search.relatedScansDescription: Useful reports when the scan is not yet correctly linked to the catalogue.
search.noUnknownScan: No unknown scan matches this entry.

barcodes.title: Active and historical barcodes
barcodes.description: Central view of article identifiers by shop and type.
barcodes.newDescription: Quickly assign a code to a catalogue article.

unknownScans.title: Unknown scans to resolve
unknownScans.description: Process codes not recognized at checkout or in stock workflows.

control.title: Control view
control.description: Direct access to detailed tracking and configuration pages.
control.priorityDescription: Prioritize shops with active checkout or stock flows.

labels.title: Label batches
labels.description: Prepare, track and validate article printing.
labels.prepareDescription: Create a label batch linked to an article and print quantity.

history.title: Code change history
history.description: Trace replacements and corrections related to article identification.

messages.selectProductForBarcode: Select an article before generating a barcode.
messages.loadFailed: The barcode and label centre could not be loaded.
messages.productNotFound: The selected article could not be found.
messages.barcodeAdded: The barcode was added to the article.
messages.barcodeCreationFailed: Barcode creation failed. Check uniqueness and the entered settings.
messages.selectProductForUnknownScan: Select an article before marking this scan as resolved.
messages.resolutionProductNotFound: The article selected for resolution could not be found.
messages.unknownScanResolved: The unknown scan was resolved and linked to the selected article.
messages.unknownScanResolutionFailed: The unknown scan could not be resolved.
messages.productAndLabelQuantityRequired: Article and label quantity are required.
messages.labelBatchPreparationFailed: The label batch could not be prepared.
messages.noLabelsInBatch: No article labels are linked to this batch.
messages.labelBatchPrinted: The label batch was marked as printed.
messages.printUpdateFailed: The print status could not be updated.
